full_text:
Extreme heat in pregnancy raises risk to newborns in India: Study
It found that sustained spells of extreme heat are associated with a measurable increase in the risk of low birth weight, preterm birth, and stillbirth, with the effect depending on when in the pregnancy the heat occurred.
